_help: Greenprint config. All optional — delete this file and sane defaults apply. Globs match POSIX paths relative to the repo root and support ** (any depth), * (within a segment), and ?.
_help_ignore: Add paths here that should NEVER require a proving test (docs, generated code, configs, migrations). This is the main knob if Greenprint ever nags on a legitimate non-bug-fix edit.
_help_pretool_hard_block: false (default) = deny edits via the documented permissionDecision and let Claude redirect to /repro cleanly. true = ALSO exit(2) to force the block harder, at the small risk of halting the turn on some builds. The Stop gate enforces correctness either way.
